10566401.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
10566401.description: TV personality Kim Kardashian builds a multi-million-dollar empire and becomes a pop culture phenomena, Kardashian's leaked sex tape thrusts her into the limelight, and her nude backside famously "broke" the internet in 2014.

10567335.title: Scandal Made Me Famous
10567335.description: A teen from an affluent family drunkenly runs down a disabled SUV killing four people and injuring nine; the trial thrusts Ethan and his family into the spotlight when his lawyers claim he cannot serve jail time due to Affluenza.

10567496.title: Judge Judy
10567496.description: A woman is accused of selling heroin to a former addict, a woman says her ex-lover took possessions.

10568346.title: Cheaters
10568346.description: Delores is suspicious of her fiancé's changing behaviour. Cheaters' investigators are called in to confirm whether her man is a cheat. Hosted by Joey Greco.

10568529.title: Cheaters
10568529.description: With host Joey Greco. The Cheaters team is called in by Daisy, who is suspicious of her boyfriend Chris. Undercover surveillance confirms her worst fears.

10569436.title: Celebrity Damage Control
10569436.description: When allegations broke that TV chef Paula Deen had a history of using racial epithets, the controversy threatened to destroy her culinary empire.

10570369.title: Evidence of Evil
10570369.description: December 2000: 19-year-old Rachel Manning was murdered in Milton Keynes. Two men were wrongfully convicted, but new advances in forensics proved that evil always leaves a trace.

10571305.title: Judge Judy
10571305.description: Teen girls get into a cat fight over an iPhone and blame each other for instigating the violence. The underage abuse of alcohol is called into question.

10571411.title: Judge Judy
10571411.description: A dispute over who started a fight; a woman says she borrowed her sister's car and was the victim of a hit-and-run.

10571512.title: Judge Judy
10571512.description: A musician and a club promoter dispute a performance that never happened.

10572341.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
10572341.description: While Team Salvage is in the middle of a yacht rescue operation, their vehicles get stuck in the mud one after one.

10573307.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10573307.description: Dog and Beth train fellow bondsman and PI Elliot Sondag, helping him track down one of his most elusive fugitives in a gripping 24-hour escapade. Meanwhile, the Chapmans try to find a man that Elliot has spent six months chasing.

10573504.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10573504.description: Two young men are attempting to set a world record rowing the Atlantic, when a freak wave capsizes their boat. Also, a family day out in the snow almost ends in tragedy when a dad has an accident sledging.

10574311.title: Operation Repo
10574311.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10574429.title: Operation Repo
10574429.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10574512.title: Haunted Case Files
10574512.description: In Ontario cottage country, an investigator is stalked by a terrifying beast-like entity; in Ohio, Karlo and his team are frozen in fear when they come face to face with the ghost of an executioner on an old jail's death row.

10575456.title: Judge Judy
10575456.description: A dog trainer sues a former friend for repayment of a loan to start an internet car business. Two young boys take the stand when one set of parents sues the other over an injury involving a piece of popcorn.

10576303.title: Judge Judy
10576303.description: Ex-boyfriend and mum fight over bail money; daughter keeps buying on deceased mother's credit card.

10576372.title: Judge Judy
10576372.description: Harassment, a restraining order, destruction of property, theft and nonpayment of rent.

10576456.title: Operation Repo
10576456.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10577312.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
10577312.description: While Team Salvage is in the middle of a yacht rescue operation, their vehicles get stuck in the mud one after one.

10577518.title: Something's Killing Me
10577518.description: Dr. Bill Lidner collapses after returning home from a family trip overseas; his daughters find him bleeding; they don't know it, but it's the first sign that something's very wrong.

10578175.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10578175.description: Two young men are attempting to set a world record rowing the Atlantic, when a freak wave capsizes their boat. Also, a family day out in the snow almost ends in tragedy when a dad has an accident sledging.

10578288.description: Dog and Beth train fellow bondsman and PI Elliot Sondag, helping him track down one of his most elusive fugitives in a gripping 24-hour escapade. Meanwhile, the Chapmans try to find a man that Elliot has spent six months chasing.

10579214.title: Judge Judy
10579214.description: Being too drunk to remember what happened is a driver's defence after he wrecks his child's mother's car; a truck loan and physical threats end a friendship.

10580053.title: Judge Judy
10580053.description: A young woman claims she was swindled out of $7,500 of her college savings by her father's friend. He claims he needed $20,000 to start an online music business. A man claims the pedigree puppy he found in the middle of the road would have been euthanised if he hadn't taken him in. The pet's original owner is sued for his vet bills.

10580119.title: Haunted Case Files
10580119.description: In Ontario cottage country, an investigator is stalked by a terrifying beast-like entity; in Ohio, Karlo and his team are frozen in fear when they come face to face with the ghost of an executioner on an old jail's death row.

10583213.description: Ex-boyfriend and mum fight over bail money; daughter keeps buying on deceased mother's credit card.

10584065.description: Harassment, a restraining order, destruction of property, theft and nonpayment of rent.

10584187.description: Dr. Bill Lidner collapses after returning home from a family trip overseas; his daughters find him bleeding; they don't know it, but it's the first sign that something's very wrong.

10585106.title: World's Most Evil Killers
10585106.description: Looking at the life and horrifying crimes of Angel Maturino Reséndiz, also known as the Railroad Killer as most of his crimes were committed near railways as he travelled across the United States.

10586061.title: Cheaters
10586061.description: Pablo is suspicious of wife Patsy's social life, especially after finding hotel receipts in her purse. Lashonda grows tired of partner Glenn's duplicity.

10586278.title: Wives With Knives
10586278.description: Edna Wilson's reunion with a high-school flame leads to a whirlwind romance and marriage, then jealousy rips the relationship apart, and it ends in a fierce battle of wills.

10587201.title: Paranormal Survivor
10587201.description: Julie purchases a farmhouse and claims it's haunted by an evil slave runner. A couple shares their story of a ghost targeting their son; the story of a fixer-upper haunting.
